010 *

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops.*;
026
027import jakarta.servlet.http.*;
028
029/**
030 * Identical to {@link BasicRestServlet} but doesn't extend from {@link HttpServlet}.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Meant as a base class for child REST resources in servlet containers and Spring Boot environments.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Provides support for JSON, XML, HTML, URL-Encoding, UON, XML, OpenAPI, and MessagePack.  See {@link BasicUniversalConfig}
037 * for details.
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * The residual cross-cutting endpoints are supplied by single-responsibility op-mixins ({@link ErrorMixin},
041 * {@link HtdocMixin}, {@link StatsMixin}, and {@link FaviconMixin}), and the api-docs surface by the
042 * api-docs mixin pack ({@link SwaggerUiMixin} and {@link RedocMixin}, which transitively pull in
043 * {@link SwaggerMixin} and {@link OpenApiMixin}). Resulting endpoints:
044 * {@code /api}, {@code /swagger}, {@code /openapi}, {@code /openapi.json}, {@code /openapi.yaml},
045 * {@code /redoc}, {@code /htdocs/*}, {@code /favicon.ico}, {@code /stats}, {@code /error}.
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
048 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestAnnotatedClasses">@Rest-Annotated Class Basics</a>
049 * </ul>
050 */
051// @formatter:off
052@Rest(mixins={SwaggerUiMixin.class, RedocMixin.class, ErrorMixin.class, HtdocMixin.class, StatsMixin.class, FaviconMixin.class})
053@HtmlDocConfig(
054   // Basic page navigation links.
055   navlinks={
056      "up: request:/..",
057      "api: servlet:/api",
058      "stats: servlet:/stats"
059   }
060)
061@JsonSchemaConfig(
062   // Add descriptions to the following types when not specified:
063   addDescriptionsTo="bean,collection,array,map,enum",
064   // Add example to the following types:
065   addExamplesTo="bean,collection,array,map",
066   // Don't generate schema information on the Swagger / OpenApi beans themselves or HTML beans.
067   ignoreTypes="Swagger,OpenApi,org.apache.juneau.bean.html5.*",
068   // Use $ref references for bean definitions to reduce duplication in generated specs.
069   useBeanDefs="true"
070)
071// @formatter:on
072public abstract class BasicRestResource extends RestResource implements BasicUniversalConfig {}
